name: fleet maintenance supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For fleet maintenance supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent scheduling causes unexpected vehicle downtime. We provide a scheduling tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inconsistent scheduling of preventative maintenance tasks leads to unexpected vehicle downtime.
